Crew Cabins: 1 additional for captain, with a private bathroom. Bathrooms: 5 plus 2 for crew. Showers: 5 total, four with enclosures. Galley Appliances: Stove: Yes Oven: Yes Refrigerator: 615 liters with ice maker and dedicated inverter.Additional features include a dishwasher, microwave, and an open lounge design that creates an inviting atmosphere.Engine and PropulsionPerformance is key with the Bali 5.4, which is equipped with two powerful inboard engines:Number of Engines: 2 Engine Type: Inboard diesel Brand: Yanmar Power: 2 x 80 hp Year of Engines: 2023 Fuel Tank Capacity: 1,200 liters Transmission: S-drive Steering Type: Wheel steering Bow Thruster: Yes, on one hull for enhanced maneuverability.The engines have been regularly serviced, ensuring reliable operation.Navigation and Safety EquipmentThe Bali 5.4 comes equipped with advanced navigation instruments:Autopilot: Yes (P70 system) VHF Radio: Yes Echo Sounder: Yes Log: Yes Compass: Yes Plotter: Yes (Raymarine Axiom 7") Wind Instrument: YesElectrical and Water SystemsThe electrical systems onboard ensure comfort and convenience:Voltage: 12/220V Number of Batteries: 5 + 2 for engines Total Amperage: 520 + 200 for engines Water Tanks: 1 tank with a capacity of 1,200 liters (plastic) Pumps: 4 bilge pumps (automatic and manual) Air Conditioning: Yes, with heating and cooling inverter.Additional features include a generator, solar panels, desalination system, and an outdoor shower.Additional FeaturesMast Material: Aluminum. Winches: 4 Antal winches, with electric winches for main and solent sails. Sails: Dacron full-batten mainsail with lazy bag and self-tacking solent. Tender: Highfield with an outboard motor. Anchoring Gear: Includes anchor, 70 meters of chain, and 6 fenders. Liferaft: For 12 people, valid until 2025. descriptionHtml:
Bali 5.4 for Sale 2023

Introducing the Bali 5.4 2023, a spacious and versatile catamaran from the well-respected Catana Group. Currently located in Sardinia and in good condition, this vessel is designed for those who value comfort and performance on the water. With a length of 16.80 meters and a beam of 8.74 meters, the Bali 5.4 is perfect for both leisurely cruising and entertaining friends and family.

Key Specifications

Model: Bali 5.4
Flag: Italy
Year Built: 2023
Designer: Poncin/Fay
Overall Length: 16.80 m
Displacement: 32,000 kg
Number of Owners: 1
Registration: Registered vessel
Safety Certificate Expiry: 2031
Capacity: A 16, B 16, C 24, D 40
CE Marking: A

Deck and Hull

The exterior of the Bali 5.4 features a striking white fiberglass hull with a durable design:

Teak Walkways: Doussie wood for a touch of elegance.
Teak Cockpit: Doussie wood in the stern area.
Bimini: Yes, providing shade and comfort.
Cockpit Table: Located in both the bow and flybridge.
Open Lounge: With a rear hatch that opens for easy access.

This model includes various amenities such as an outdoor BBQ and ample seating areas, making it ideal for socializing.

Interior

The interior space of the Bali 5.4 is designed for maximum comfort and functionality:

Cabins: 5 double cabins for guests plus 1 crew cabin.
Crew Cabins: 1 additional for captain, with a private bathroom.
Bathrooms: 5 plus 2 for crew.
Showers: 5 total, four with enclosures.
Galley Appliances:
Stove: Yes
Oven: Yes
Refrigerator: 615 liters with ice maker and dedicated inverter.

Additional features include a dishwasher, microwave, and an open lounge design that creates an inviting atmosphere.

Engine and Propulsion

Performance is key with the Bali 5.4, which is equipped with two powerful inboard engines:

Number of Engines: 2
Engine Type: Inboard diesel
Brand: Yanmar
Power: 2 x 80 hp
Year of Engines: 2023
Fuel Tank Capacity: 1,200 liters
Transmission: S-drive
Steering Type: Wheel steering
Bow Thruster: Yes, on one hull for enhanced maneuverability.

The engines have been regularly serviced, ensuring reliable operation.

Navigation and Safety Equipment

The Bali 5.4 comes equipped with advanced navigation instruments:

Autopilot: Yes (P70 system)
VHF Radio: Yes
Echo Sounder: Yes
Log: Yes
Compass: Yes
Plotter: Yes (Raymarine Axiom 7")
Wind Instrument: Yes

Electrical and Water Systems

The electrical systems onboard ensure comfort and convenience:

Voltage: 12/220V
Number of Batteries: 5 + 2 for engines
Total Amperage: 520 + 200 for engines
Water Tanks: 1 tank with a capacity of 1,200 liters (plastic)
Pumps: 4 bilge pumps (automatic and manual)
Air Conditioning: Yes, with heating and cooling inverter.

Additional features include a generator, solar panels, desalination system, and an outdoor shower.

Additional Features

Mast Material: Aluminum.
Winches: 4 Antal winches, with electric winches for main and solent sails.
Sails: Dacron full-batten mainsail with lazy bag and self-tacking solent.
Tender: Highfield with an outboard motor.
Anchoring Gear: Includes anchor, 70 meters of chain, and 6 fenders.
Liferaft: For 12 people, valid until 2025.
Electric crane for the tender and full safety gear.

The Bali 5.4  2023 offers a unique opportunity to enjoy comfortable sailing with family and friends. For more information or to schedule a viewing, please get in touch.
